input.command:
python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json
# Search Mar 22 articles for IQAir, Lukashenko, IPL, etc.
with open('articles/2026/03/22/articles.jsonl','r') as f:
    for line in f:
        a = json.loads(line)
        title = (a.get('title') or '').lower()
        content = (a.get('content') or '')[:2000].lower()
        for kw in ['iqair', 'polluted city', 'lukashenko', 'ipl franchise', 'blitzer', 'bolt ventures', 
                    'afghanistan dennis', 'codrington', 'trump pause', 'trump 10-day', '10-day pause',
                    'australia visa', 'temporary visa', 'drone latvia', 'kosovo playoff', 'italy playoff',
                    'world cup semifinal']:
            if kw in title or kw in content[:500]:
                print(f'[{kw}] {a["title"][:120]}')
                break
PYEOF
